reviews.comment:
Parabamos siempre al regreso de MDP. Baños limpios, muy buena atención y me encanta la zona de descanso p pasear mascotas mientras se carga nafta. Los playeros son muy amables al menos los del turno nocturno. Espero regresar pronto

(Translated by Google)
We always stopped there on our way back from Mar del Plata. Clean restrooms, great service, and I love the rest area for walking pets while you fill up. The attendants are very friendly, at least those on the night shift. I hope to return soon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwcUtxbmxBRRAB
